pending.message: Thank you Ken for all his effort supporting AINCHORS for one month. Angie wants to ask: Are you still interested in helping her deliver training in Australia in the coming months? If yes, Angie will send over a training contract.

[CR FROM ARIA] CR-001: LinkedIn API Posting Setup

Requested by: Angie Foong (CEO)

Description: Angie wants to post LinkedIn content directly from Aria/Spark to the AInchors company LinkedIn page. She has approved the first LinkedIn drop post (Anthropic ban / AI Strait of Hormuz angle) and wants API posting set up so we can publish without manual copy-paste.

Business reason: First real marketing campaign execution. Angie wants to see AInchors posting on LinkedIn with minimal friction. Manual posting is a bottleneck.

What is needed: LinkedIn API access (OAuth or similar) for the AInchors company page, integrated so Aria or Spark can post on behalf of the page.

Post ready to go: /Users/ainchorsangiefpl/.openclaw/workspace-business/projects/brand-code/linkedin-drop-post-01.md
pending.resolutionNote: CR-001 fulfilled by CR-002 LinkedIn business stream enablement. OAuth complete for Angie personal, AInchors business; org ID 112732790 confirmed; multi-account scripts and business-stream publish crons deployed. Aria owns ongoing campaign execution.
